g.title: deploy_environments
g.text: One deploy environment (prod / staging / any custom name) for a repository; 1:N per repo since v20, which replaced the single deploy_manifests row.
JSON map of environment-scope placeholder values. Repo-wide ones live in repositories.deploy_repo_config.

g.title: repositories
g.text: A repository belonging to at most one project. May be GitHub-backed or local-only.
ON DELETE SET NULL — the only non-cascading FK in the schema. Deleting a project orphans its repositories rather than destroying them.
UNIQUE, and nullable since v13 so local-only repos (never pushed to GitHub) can exist. The last path segment is the canonical folder name used for all cross-repo doc folders.
'microservice' is still legal here but is legacy: v12 NULLed every such row when microservice became a project type rather than a repo role.
Stable GitHub identifier — the basis of rename detection.
Lazy-migration marker (v18); NULL means the repo's MD has never been imported.
Lazy-migration marker (v21). While NULL, the first task sync suppresses 'created' events so backfilling legacy files doesn't flood the timeline.
v25 — JSON map of repo-wide (not per-environment) deploy placeholder values.
v28 — NULL means auto-commit is off for this repo.

g.title: deploy_environments:repository_id->repositories:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

g.title: deploy_secrets
g.text: Per-environment per-secret flags: which role the secret plays and whether it is included or overridden. Values are NOT stored here.
build / deploy / runtime — decides where the secret is injected.
0 excludes the secret from this environment without deleting its configuration.

g.title: deploy_secrets:deploy_env_id->deploy_environments:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

g.title: deploy_events
g.text: Log of deploy operations (template render, GitHub secret set/delete). deploy_env_id is nullable so repo-level actions can be recorded too.

g.title: deploy_events:deploy_env_id->deploy_environments:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

g.title: deploy_secret_values
g.text: v27 — persisted deploy secret values, encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. The data key lives in the OS keyring; no plaintext value is ever stored.
AES-256-GCM ciphertext. Never logged, never exported.
Per-value random nonce; required to decrypt ciphertext.

g.title: deploy_secret_values:deploy_env_id->deploy_environments:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
